description: Recto: end of a Judaeo-Arabic legal document, signed by Eliyyahu b. Moshe, Nissim [..], Ismaʿīl b. Khal[af], Shemuʾel b. Neḥemya Kohen, [… b. She]lomo, Barukh b. Yaʿaqov, and Daniʾel b. Ḥ[..]n. Verso: liturgical poetry in Hebrew (part of a rotulus). (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
